% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	& {X\otimes(Y\otimes Z)} && {(Y\otimes Z) \otimes X} & \\
	{(X\otimes Y)\otimes Z} &&&& {Y \otimes (Z \otimes X)} \\
	& {(Y \otimes X) \otimes Z} && {Y \otimes (X \otimes Z)}
	\arrow["{\tau_{X, Y\otimes Z}}", from=1-2, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{Y,Z,X}}", from=1-4, to=2-5]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,Y,Z}}", from=2-1, to=1-2]
	\arrow["{\tau_{X,Y} \otimes \id_{Z}}"'{pos=0.2}, from=2-1, to=3-2]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{Y,X,Z}}"', from=3-2, to=3-4]
	\arrow["{\id_{Y} \otimes \tau_{X,Z}}"'{pos=0.7}, from=3-4, to=2-5]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
